Equity Research Analyst Note

Subject: Upcoming Earnings Preview for Stellar Dynamics Pte. Ltd.

Dear Investors,

Our analysis team at EquiTrack Research, led by Mr. Lee Wei Ming, anticipates Stellar Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 198765432W) will report its quarterly earnings on 15th November 2023. Our projections suggest a revenue increase of approximately 12% year-on-year. Dr. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, our senior economist, emphasizes the potential impact of recent market expansions.

For any inquiries, please contact our office at +65 6123 4567 or email Dr. Abdullah at research@equitrack.sg. To discuss further, reach out to Mr. Lee at lee.wm@equitrack.sg, NRIC S1234567A.

We look forward to your participation in the post-earnings conference call.

Best regards,

Ramasamy Muthu  
Equity Research Analyst  
EquiTrack Research
